summary: The diff implements comprehensive OTP authentication flow including backend methods (sendOTP, verifyOTP, signup), frontend hooks, and UI components for mobile number entry, OTP verification, and new user signup. However, some acceptance criteria details are not fully evident from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.reason: The signup form in LoginPage.tsx only shows Full Name field. No evidence of Class/Course field implementation in the truncated code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Validate 10-digit mobile number format in sendOTP
missing_requirements.reason: Backend sendOTP validates mobile number length (10 digits) but the requirement specifies accepting it 'as Text' format. The validation is present but may not match exact requirement wording about format acceptance.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for data structure upgrades
hallucinated_features.reason: A migration.mo file was added to handle UserProfile schema changes (adding id field and verifiedMobileNumbers map). This migration functionality was not requested in any requirement.
StudyTimer.tsx includes pause and resume buttons with state management. This feature was not part of the OTP login flow requirements and extends beyond fixing the login functionality.

hallucinated_features.description: Timer reset on chapter selection change
hallucinated_features.reason: StudyTimer automatically resets when selectedChapter changes via useEffect. This behavior was not specified in the OTP login fix requirements.
